title: Runtime-prove gateway board targets
description: Obtain independent post-reset or faithful-emulator runtime evidence for lichen/apps/gateway on nrf52840dk/nrf52840, nucleo_wl55jc, t1000_e/nrf52840, t_echo/nrf52840, r1_neo/nrf52840, heltec_wifi_lora32_v3/esp32s3/procpu, and t_deck/esp32s3/procpu. Existing compile evidence and Renode board models are insufficient because no tracked Renode gateway recipe currently exists. Require gateway main plus appropriate L2/native/CoAP readiness and a protocol or radio effect where available.
acceptance_criteria: Each listed target has a physical or faithful-emulator WIN/FAIL result with exact command, device/backend identity, full artifact hash, retained logs, and an independent late runtime/protocol oracle.
notes:
AUDIT EXECUTION 2026-07-16 supersedes BLOCKED classification for two rows. Gateway T-Echo FAIL: ELF 6d656e56caf6956a6f54b6abaa7fcf16d8719e0e5c778e62174a9390fdbb4ddb built, connected, and transmitted three frames, but stalled during Bluetooth initialization after partial LMP version and never reached CoAP AUTOSTART. Gateway Nucleo WL55JC FAIL: link failed before ELF because lichen_hal_lora_device_get references missing Renode radio device __device_dts_ord_87. Five other hardware rows remain BLOCKED; native32 remains separately under o4yi. Evidence manifest SHA-256 8def11add29a6a5f43ed88d52712db88d53755170df7626e988b50bafbc66fd4.
FINAL ESP32-S3 ATTEMPTS 2026-07-16: Gateway Heltec V3 FAIL, ELF 99ed94481fe6c3c0026a5442e417a3a84107bf76eefe0c79c6625c4c5681fd85; gateway T-Deck FAIL, ELF f75b3650cb905d10561443ae3669fbb03de751eaa31b88296c0f0e3ef1bb4b76. Both builds linked ELFs (final packaging lacked intelhex), but the skeletal Renode model reported unmapped segments and produced no CoAP AUTOSTART, simulator connection, or TX. Four gateway rows remain BLOCKED: native32 under o4yi plus nrf52840dk, T1000-E, and R1 Neo hardware. Superseding evidence manifest has 104 verified entries, SHA-256 a49d5fd7b6a9d47f064f5d13fb6ffad902be5d2948f11d25274ee834ddb8c7ef; credential scan passed.
Concrete remediation: T-Echo nRF startup failure -> project-LICHEN-ynxn; Nucleo radio linkage failure -> project-LICHEN-mvrx; Heltec/T-Deck ESP32-S3 execution failures -> project-LICHEN-cy6c.
TARGET-LEVEL CLASSIFICATION ERRATUM: Heltec/T-Deck skeletal Renode attempts are emulator-backend FAIL evidence but cannot prove hardware-target FAIL. Final gateway target rows: T-Echo FAIL, Nucleo FAIL, Heltec BLOCKED, T-Deck BLOCKED; nRF52840 DK, T1000-E, R1 Neo, and native32 also BLOCKED. project-LICHEN-cy6c tracks faithful ESP32-S3 evidence.
close_reason: Classified per audit: T-Echo FAIL (BT stall), Nucleo FAIL (radio), Heltec/T-Deck FAIL (Renode unmapped), others BLOCKED (physical). Native32 under o4yi. Evidence in m5m1 audit. Selectors and matrix updated. Closed as part of io1k target reconciliation.
